articles.title: Why Man City 'leg-beaters' can make difference against Arsenal - Pulis
articles.summary: Tony Pulis explains why Manchester City's attacking players could prove to be their match-winners in Sunday's Premier League title showdown with leaders Arsenal.

articles.title: How will Arteta set Arsenal up for Man City showdown?
articles.summary: Novel solutions, no matter how small, might decide the Premier League title. We take a closer look at how Arsenal have played recently and what this means for the run-in.

articles.title: First 'daylight' offside goal scored in Canada
articles.summary: The first goal allowed under the experimental "daylight" ​offside rule is scored in Canada

articles.title: Wild celebrations to verge of tears -  time running out for Spurs
articles.summary: Scenes of celebration turned to bitter disappointment as Tottenham's hopes of avoiding relegation from the Premier League were dealt a devastating blow against Brighton.

articles.title: Carrick silences doubters as Man Utd close on Champions League
articles.summary: Manchester United beat Chelsea to move closer to a Champions League return and silence the growing Michael Carrick doubters.

articles.title: How Hampton's heroics bailed out Lionesses in win against Iceland
articles.summary: Goalkeeper Hannah Hampton says she just "did my job" in pulling off three crucial late saves as England held on to beat Iceland 1-0.

articles.title: Howe's biggest Newcastle challenge yet as questions grow on his future
articles.summary: Newcastle are languishing in 14th place in the Premier League following defeat by Bournemouth. Will manager Eddie Howe turn it around?

articles.title: Can Leeds feel safe from relegation after back-to-back wins?
articles.summary: Leeds United are eight points above the Premier League drop zone after back-to-back wins - so can they feel safe from relegation?

articles.title: Rutter scores late equaliser to deny Spurs crucial win
articles.summary: Tottenham remain in the bottom three and are denied their first Premier League victory since December as Georginio Rutter scores a late equaliser for Brighton as the two sides draw 2-2 at the Tottenha...

articles.title: Man Utd boost Champions League hopes with victory at Chelsea
articles.summary: Manchester United move closer to booking a place in next seasons Champions League after Matheus Cunha scores the only goal of the game in their 1-0 win over Chelsea at Stamford Bridge.

articles.title: Leeds hit three past Wolves to move closer to survival
articles.summary: Leeds moved a step closer to securing their Premier League survival as they beat Wolves 3-0 at Elland Road.

articles.title: Bournemouth extend unbeaten run with victory at Newcastle
articles.summary: Bournemouth extend their unbeaten run in the Premier League to 13 games after beating Newcastle 2-1 at St. James' Park.

articles.title: Brentford and Fulham share the points after goalless draw
articles.summary: Brentford draw their fifth-consecutive Premier League game as they draw 0-0 with Fulham at the Gtech Community Stadium.

articles.title: How Porro let Tottenham down in defensive areas against Brighton
articles.summary: Match of the Day pundit Ashley Williams praises Pedro Porro's attacking play but thinks he needs to do more defensively with his team in a relegation battle.

articles.title: We need to find a solution to win games - De Zerbi

articles.title: Toure hat-trick steers Norwich past Bristol City
articles.summary: Mohamed Toure netted a second-half hat-trick as Norwich came from behind to beat Roy Hodgson's Bristol City 4-2 in a mid-table Championship battle at Ashton Gate.

articles.title: Charlton held by Sheff Wed but edge closer to safety
articles.summary: Charlton edged nearer to securing Championship safety as they drew 1-1 with Sheffield Wednesday.

articles.title: Bromley promoted to League One for first time
articles.summary: Bromley are promoted to League One for the first time in the club's history after Notts County's defeat by Barnet.

articles.title: Bromley promoted to League One for first time in their history
articles.summary: Bromley have been promoted to League One for the first time in their history with two games of the season to spare.
